calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-23-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Jonathan M. Eldan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Olive Grove Partners II, ltd., a Texas limited partnership.
No appearance by defendant William Ryan, an individual.
Default was entered against defendant on June 15, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 27, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 30, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Olive Grove Partners II, Ltd., a Texas limited partnership, and against the Defaulted Defendant William Ryan, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $175,898.93.
Prejudgment Interest - $13,666.47.
Attorney's Fees - $4,853.00.
Costs - $2,023.70, for a total judgment in the amount of $196,442.10.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
